vulnerability.reference: Patients disengage from the app when receiving irrelevant or mistimed notifications.
vulnerability.generated: Patients lack mechanisms to detect erroneous app recommendations, relying solely on the mobile health intervention's guidance for chronic condition management.

impact.reference: Worsened chronic condition management due to patient non-adherence.
impact.generated: Wrongly timed or content-inappropriate health reminders cause poor self-management, leading to preventable complications and declining health in chronic care patients.

dose_response.reference: Biased or high-variance off-policy evaluation estimates enable unreliable policy recommendations, which in mobile health behavioral coaching leads to wrongly timed or content-inappropriate reminders that cause patient disengagement.
dose_response.generated: Biased or high-variance off-policy evaluation estimates, through patients using mobile health apps for chronic management, trigger a lack of error-detection mechanisms, leading to wrongly timed or content-inappropriate reminders causing poor self-management, preventable complications, and declining health.
